title: Ex-officio offices
doc_html:
PART IV.  CLERKS

SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§751.  Ex-officio offices

The clerks of the several district courts shall be parish registers of conveyances and recorders of mortgages, and notaries public, ex-officio.

PART IV.  CLERKS

§751.  Ex-officio offices
